name: Circulation Desk
short_description: Check out materials and pick up course reserves.
long_description: The Circulation Desk is where you can check out materials and pick up course reserves with your Vandal ID.

name: Special Collections Reading Room
short_description: Reading room for Special Collections and Archives. By appointment.
long_description: You can make an appointment with the Special Collections and Archives staff to access the unique and rare materials, including many primary sources, that are housed in Special Collections.

name: Interlibrary Loan
short_description: Request books and articles from other libraries.
long_description: Interlibrary Loan helps you get books, articles, and other materials that the U of I Library doesn't have on hand by requesting them from other libraries.

name: Living Room
short_description: Casual seating with periodicals, board games, and graphic novels.
long_description: A casual, open seating area featuring the New Books and Graphic Novels collections, current periodicals, and a board-game library.

name: Reservable Group Study Rooms
short_description: Bookable group study rooms for collaborative work.
long_description: Bookable group study rooms for collaborative work. Reserve in advance through the library website.

name: Open Group Study Area
short_description: Open seating for casual group study.
long_description: An open seating area for casual group study and conversation.

name: The Fishbowl
short_description: Round collaborative space near the entrance.
long_description: A circular collaborative space near the entrance, often used for group conversations and quick meetings.

name: Instruction Room
short_description: Reservable classroom for library workshops and class sessions.
long_description: A reservable instruction space used for library workshops and class sessions.

name: Board Games
short_description: Board games available for use in the Living Room.
long_description: A collection of board games available for use in the Living Room.

name: New Books
short_description: Rotating display of recently acquired titles.
long_description: A rotating display of recently acquired titles in the Living Room.

name: Current Periodicals
short_description: Recent issues of magazines and journals.
long_description: Recent issues of magazines and journals, available in the Living Room.

name: Graphic Novels
short_description: Graphic novels collection in the Living Room.
long_description: The library's graphic novels collection, located in the Living Room.

name: The Studio
short_description: Audiovisual recording, editing, and digitization space.
long_description: The Studio offers dedicated space to students, staff, and faculty to record, edit, and digitize audiovisual content to support their teaching, learning, and creative pursuits.

name: Student Computer Lab
short_description: Computers with specialized software (MATLAB, ArcGIS, Adobe).
long_description: Computer labs are located on the Library's first, second, and fourth floors. The labs offer specialized software such as MATLAB, MathCAD, SPSS, ArcGIS, Adobe Creative Suite, and other applications.

name: The Mill
short_description: The library's makerspace — buttons, vinyl, 3D printing, and more.
long_description: The Making, Innovating, and Learning Laboratory (AKA The Mill) is the library's makerspace. You can find tools and equipment here to make buttons, vinyl stickers, your own 3D prints, and so much more.

name: Data Hub & Map Room
short_description: GIS, data sciences, data analysis, and the physical map collection.
long_description: Home to the physical portion of the university's map collection. The Data Hub is a dedicated service location providing co-curricular and research support in the areas of geographic information systems, data sciences, and data analysis.

name: Library Computer (Entrance)
short_description: Public-access computer near the entrance.

name: Reference Collection
short_description: Encyclopedias, dictionaries, and handbooks for in-library use.
long_description: Quick-reference works (encyclopedias, dictionaries, handbooks) for in-library use.

name: Library Computer (Reference area)

name: KIC Scanner
short_description: Self-service book and document scanner.
long_description: A self-service scanner station for digitizing books and documents to PDF or image files.

long_description: ITS staff can help you with your computer and printing needs.

name: Boise Cascade Assistive Technology Room
short_description: Assistive technology lab for students with disabilities.
long_description: The Boise Cascade Assistive Technology Room is home to the Center for Disability Access and Resources' assistive technology lab (CDAR). This space features an array of assistive technologies including hardware and software designed to assist students with disabilities.

name: Research Computing and Data Services (RCDS)

name: Graduate Student Carrels
short_description: Carrels reserved for approved graduate students.
long_description: Study carrels are available to UI graduate students who have an approved thesis or dissertation topic and who do not have an assigned office, desk, or carrel elsewhere on campus. Carrel applications are available online and at the Circulation Desk.
